## Summary
All IDX stock sectors weakened on Monday April 20, 2026, with the property sector experiencing the largest decline.

## Key Points
• All IDX sectors traded in negative territory on Monday
• Property sector led the decline with the biggest drop
• Broad-based selling pressure across Indonesian equities
• Market weakness reflects cautious sentiment

## Portfolio Impact
🔴 **Negative** — Broad market weakness on Monday affected all sectors. Your portfolio closed at -Rp 1.77M (-1.36%) on Monday, recovering from Thursday's -Rp 11M low. Tuesday's session showed strong recovery to +Rp 1.40M (+1.08%), driven by ESSA's +8.44% surge despite the prior day's broad weakness.
